# ErrorRegistry.IsReservedErrorCode method

Returns `true` when *code* is one of the eight reserved codes (R-22.7-c).

```csharp
public static bool IsReservedErrorCode(int code)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| code | The numeric error code to test. |

## Return Value

`true` when the code is reserved.
